data.title: SlowMist releases Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702) security reminder, reminding users to be vigilant about cross-chain replay and delegate call risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: With the official launch of the Ethereum Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702), SlowMist has issued a security reminder for users, wallet providers, developers and centralized exchanges. Users are advised to pay attention to private key protection, cross-chain contract code differences and delegated target risks; wallets should detect delegated chain information and prompt replay risks with chain ID 0; developers should avoid using tx.origin as a defense measure and ensure that the delegated target contract is compatible with mainstream tokens; CEXs need to track and check deposit transactions to prevent forged deposits.

data.title: Planet Evening News
DePINX invests $3 million to establish "DUCK Nest Fund" with DuckChain to accelerate DUCK application and ecological expansion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On May 8, according to the official news of DuckChain, DePINX invested 3 million US dollars to establish a special fund "DUCK Nest Fund" with DuckChain, aiming to accelerate the application and ecological expansion of DUCK, and promote the deep integration and innovative practice of AI and on-chain finance.
This injection of long-term funds will provide strong support for DuckChain to build a more robust and sustainable ecological system and on-chain profit mechanism. Previously, DuckChain has received investment support from many top institutions such as OKX Ventures, dao5, Kenetic Capital, and Offchain Labs.

data.title: Robinhood Pivoting To RWA: Plans To Offer Tokenized US Securities In Europe
data.description:
Investment platform Robinhood is reportedly developing a blockchain-based platform aimed at enabling European investors to trade tokenized US securities. The move into the real-world asset (RWA) sector highlights the firm’s ongoing strategy of utilizing blockchain technology to streamline cross-border investing. (SOURCE) Robinhood’s Recent Brokerage Licence Acquisition In Lithuania A Boost To Its European Expansion Plans.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/robinhood-pivoting-to-rwa-plans-to-offer-tokenized-us-securities-in-europe/

data.title: Binance Square launches Terminal feature to support real-time trading sharing and interaction
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance announced that Binance Square has launched a new feature Terminal, which supports viewing and sharing trading dynamics in real-time candlestick charts. The first batch of support includes tokens such as BTC. Users can display personal transactions in real time, view other people's operations, participate in community discussions, and compare trading performance with other traders, realizing an interactive experience while trading.

data.description:
US President Donald Trump-backed World Liberty Financial’s (WLFI) stablecoin is making its way to the tally of the biggest cryptos in the market. The dollar-pegged USD1 has exploded into the world’s 7th-largest stablecoin in just two months. Launched back in March with a size of $3. 5 million supply, USD1 has zoomed to a $2. 2 billion […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-usd1-into-top-7-stablecoins/

data.title: Strategy to Release 2025 Bitcoin Standard Model for Corporate Adoption
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Strategy is set to unveil its 2025 Bitcoin Standard Model, aimed at facilitating the integration of Bitcoin by traditional companies and enterprises. This initiative seeks to streamline the adoption process and provide a structured framework for businesses looking to incorporate Bitcoin into their operations.

data.title: Indian Firm Jetking Plans Major Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description: According to PANews, Harsh Bharwani, CEO of the Indian publicly listed company Jetking, announced plans to raise billions of dollars to acquire 18,000 Bitcoin. In a video shared by cryptocurrency influencer @pete_rizzo_, Bharwani outlined the company's strategy to expand its Bitcoin holdings. Over the next six months, Jetking aims to raise funds to acquire approximately 180 Bitcoin. Within the following year, the company plans to increase its holdings to around 1,800 Bitcoin. By 2030, leveraging various available tools and resources, Jetking intends to reach a total of 18,000 Bitcoin.

data.title: U.S.-UK Agreement Strengthens Bilateral Relations, Trump Announces
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the agreement reached with the United Kingdom is comprehensive and complete, aiming to solidify the relationship between the two nations for many years to come.

Trump emphasized the significance of the historical ties and alliance between the United States and the United Kingdom, expressing honor in naming the UK as the first partner in this announcement. He also mentioned that numerous other agreements are currently undergoing detailed negotiations, encouraging anticipation for future developments.

data.title: Hidden Road to Establish Abu Dhabi Office Following Ripple Acquisition
data.description:
According to PANews, cryptocurrency and traditional asset brokerage firm Hidden Road is set to open an office in Abu Dhabi. This development follows Ripple's recent agreement to acquire Hidden Road for $1.25 billion. The new office will be led by partner James Stickland and has received in-principle approval from the Abu Dhabi Global Market Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA). Once final approval is granted, Hidden Road will be able to offer clearing and prime brokerage services to institutional investors in the UAE.

Sources indicate that members of the Abu Dhabi royal family may join the board of Hidden Road's local entity after receiving final regulatory approval. Last month, Hidden Road also secured approval from the U.S. Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) to become a licensed broker-dealer, aiming to expand its fixed-income prime brokerage platform. Ripple plans to invest in Hidden Road to support the global expansion of its non-bank prime brokerage services.

data.title: Bitcoin Approaches $100K Following Trump’s Trade Announcement and Dollar Weakness
data.description:
TL;DR Investor Optimism: Trump’s hint at a major trade deal, intended to ease tariffs and curb inflation, has sparked strong optimism among investors, pushing Bitcoin nearer to the $100K threshold. Favorable Economic Conditions: A weaker U. S. dollar, declining bond yields, and increased institutional inflows into Bitcoin ETFs are creating a supportive environment for risk assets
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bitcoin-approaches-100k-following-trumps-trade-announcement-and-dollar-weakness/

data.title: Pectra features already in use: Ethereum EIP-7702 wallets roll out
data.description:
The Ethereum Pectra upgrade introduced a significant upgrade in account abstraction accessibility, with multiple wallets already implementing the change. Pectra introduced Ethereum Improvement Proposal (EIP) 7702, a change that Ivo Georgiev, founder and CEO of self-custodial smart wallet Ambire, described as “the single greatest UX upgrade to Ethereum so far. ” Ambire is among the wallet providers that have already rolled out support for the new features since Pectra went live yesterday. Ambire’s announcement shared with Cointelegraph explains that EIP-7702 brings smart account functionality to existing user accounts, letting them temporarily act as smart contracts
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-wallets-integrate-eip7702-account-abstraction?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin readies for parabolic run as BTC nears $100,000
data.description:
Summary:⚈ Bitcoin nears $100,000 after breaking key resistances and regaining strong uptrend⚈ Bullish momentum aided by Trump policies and global instability like India-Pakistan⚈ $100K may act as psychological resistance amid rising short positions and uncertainty Late on May 7 and in the early hours of May 8, Bitcoin (BTC) rapidly advanced, adding more than $2,500 within hours.  At press time, it needs to rise a mere 0.41% – less than $500 from the current $99,593 value – more to hit the psychologically important $100,000 threshold. BTC one-week price chart
source: https://finbold.com/bitcoin-readies-for-parabolic-run-as-btc-nears-100000/

data.title: Why Bitcoin Is Up Today? Trump’s UK Trade Deal Tease Sparks Rally
data.description:
The sudden rally appears to tie directly to U. S. President Donald Trump’s cryptic announcement of a “major trade deal” with a “highly respected country,” which The New York Times later identified as the United Kingdom
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/why-bitcoin-is-up-today-trumps-uk-trade-deal-tease-sparks-rally/
